name: @mdwrk/page-template-demo-content-pack
description: Example MdWrk content pack demonstrating page-template presets as authored starter content.

scripts.build: node ./scripts/generate-markdown-pages.mjs && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-template-presets && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: node ./scripts/generate-markdown-pages.mjs && npm run build -w @mdwrk/lander-page-template-presets && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json

author: Jacob Stewart <jacob@swarmauri.com>
